title: Assistant Director (IT)
description: The Assistant Director (IT) will be responsible for overseeing the IT infrastructure, managing software development projects, and ensuring cybersecurity compliance across the department.
requirements: Bachelors/Masters in Computer Science or IT

title: Section Officer (Admin)
description: The Section Officer will handle administrative affairs, coordination between departments, and implementation of policies.
requirements: Masters in Public Administration or equivalent

title: Junior Clerk
description: Junior Clerk positions for handling clerical work, data entry, and office management tasks.

title: Research Officer
description: Conduct policy research, data analysis, and prepare reports for development projects.

title: Accountant
description: Handle financial records, audit reports, and budget management for the commission.
